recommendations.title: The Last Client
recommendations.overview: Renowned psychologist Susanne (Signe Egholm Olsen) is caught in a living nightmare when her new client (Anton Hjejle) turns out to be a wanted serial killer.

recommendations.title: Three Days and a Life
recommendations.overview: Christmas 1999, in a peaceful little village in the Ardennes. The life of a young boy named Antoine will soon be devastated by three tragic events : the death of a dog, the vanishing of a child, and a big ravaging storm.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: 3 Generations
recommendations.overview: A teenager transitions from female to male, and his family must come to terms with that fact.

recommendations.title: Winter Spring Summer or Fall
recommendations.overview: Remi and Barnes, two very different teenagers, meet by chance in the winter of their senior year, then spend four  days together over the course of a year that will change their lives forever.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: The Reflecting Skin
recommendations.overview: In 1950s rural Idaho, a young boy watches helplessly as his friends and brother fall under the spell of a mysterious widow living up the road and becomes convinced that she is a vampire.

recommendations.title: This Is England
recommendations.overview: A story about a troubled boy growing up in England, set in 1983. He comes across a few skinheads on his way home from school, after a fight. They become his new best friends, even like family. Based on experiences of director Shane Meadows.

recommendations.title: American Woman
recommendations.overview: A young grandmother in a small Pennsylvania town raises her daughter's child after the girl disappears. All the while, a desperate search for her continues.

recommendations.title: Storm Boy
recommendations.overview: Storm Boy lives a lonely life with his reclusive father on a desolate coastline, but when he forms a close bond with a pelican, Mr. Percival, his life takes a new and unexpected turn.
